question: Considering the performance index shown over the years, which statement is best supported by the chart?

options.A: The performance index decreased every year from 2018 to 2022.
options.B: The performance index appears to be the same in 2021 and 2022.
options.C: The performance index reached its highest visible level in the final year shown.
options.D: The chart does not show whether the index in the last two years is equal or different, as values exceed the scale.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is below the data maximum, so the top bars are truncated and appear equal.
